Corner of Wheat Rd and E. 19th street.

In the fall there are two heavily laden apple trees down the left field line at black creek park.  Park on the east end of the parking lot and walk between the dugout and the fence.  Its a public park and no one harvests them. Access: Public. Falling Fruit sea
